semantic.role: Demonstration script for generating a terminal recording of ArchSpine CLI commands
responsibilities: Provide a script for VHS to record a terminal demo showing build and CLI usage
Specify the terminal settings (shell, font, theme, typing speed) and commands to run
outOfScope: Detailed project architecture or design documentation

English.purpose: This document is a VHS tape script used to automatically generate a GIF demo of the ArchSpine CLI. It walks through building the project and executing three key commands (sync, info, scan) to showcase basic functionality in a terminal environment.
English.context_and_audience: The intended audience is developers, contributors, or evaluators who want a quick visual overview of ArchSpine's command-line interface. The demo is meant for inclusion in the project's public documentation or README.
key_takeaways: The script sets up a terminal recording with a specific theme, size, and typing speed.
It first builds the project with npm run build.
Then it runs three CLI commands: sync --fast, info, and scan --dry-run.
The output is a GIF file saved at docs/public/archspine-project-demo.gif.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是一个 VHS 磁带脚本，用于自动生成 ArchSpine CLI 的演示 GIF。它引导用户完成项目的构建，并执行三个关键命令（sync、info、scan），以在终端环境中展示基本功能。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 目标受众是想要快速了解 ArchSpine 命令行界面的开发者、贡献者或评估者。该演示旨在纳入项目的公共文档或 README 中。
key_takeaways: 该脚本设置了具有特定主题、大小和打字速度的终端录制。
它首先使用 npm run build 构建项目。
然后依次运行三个 CLI 命令：sync --fast、info 和 scan --dry-run。
